ValidationRule.description: Utilization start and end date should be in the same month as that of the period ending.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: OR (MONTH( leaseworks__Start_Date__c) != MONTH(leaseworks__Month_Ending__c), YEAR(leaseworks__Start_Date__c) != YEAR(leaseworks__Month_Ending__c), MONTH( leaseworks__End_Date__c) != MONTH(leaseworks__Month_Ending__c), YEAR(leaseworks__End_Date__c) != YEAR(leaseworks__Month_Ending__c))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Utilization start and end date should be in the same month as that of the period ending.
